raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 66 aims to develop an early warning notification system for California's coastal bluff collapses.",
    "The Scripps Institution of Oceanography at UC San Diego will expand research on coastal erosion to identify indicators for bluff failure.",
    "Bluff collapses have resulted in fatalities, injuries, and millions of dollars in property damage in California.",
    "The dynamics of cliff collapse along California's coastlines can be significantly advanced through research funded by AB 66.",
    "Research from AB 66 will aim to understand the processes leading to cliff failures.",
    "Factors such as tides, large surf, groundwater, and rainfall may impact deformations leading to bluff collapses.",
    "Scientists forecast that coastal erosion will occur at more than twice the historical rate by 2100 due to rising seas.",
    "Approximately 80% of the coastline in coastal North San Diego County is covered by actively eroding bluffs."
  ]
}
```
